finding_results.notes: Replaced narrator paraphrase with brief quoted excerpts in four distinct institutional registers. The press release (line 87) now speaks in PR-hedging voice: passive construction, conditional sympathy, safety posturing, forward-looking commitments. The HR notification script (line 91) now reads as procedural call-center protocol: imperative verbs, approved-language references, scripted fallback responses, reference IDs. The analyst note (line 131) now speaks in financial-valuation register: BUY rating, price target, litigation headwind, enterprise adoption, risk-factor filing. The deployment email (line 135) now reads as corporate project-management cadence: schedule-specific timestamps, time zones, provisioned access, EOD. Each register is identifiable by diction and rhythm without labels. Existing dialogue voices (Diane Okafor's 911 call, officer body-camera speech, the parking-lot engineer, the Mariam Hassani notification call) were left untouched as they already carried distinct spoken texture.

summary: Four institutional voices that were collapsed into neutral narrator paraphrase now speak in their own registers through brief quoted excerpts: PR statement hedges in corporate sympathy, HR script deflects in imperative procedure, analyst note financializes in valuation language, deployment email proceeds in bloodless schedule cadence. The revision is tightly scoped to the four artifact sections flagged by the finding; all existing dialogue, scene detail, and chapter architecture remain unchanged. All must-land beats preserved.
